restatement.goal: Close stale queue in-progress/unchecked leftovers and set session state to done.
restatement.acceptance: All stale slice-next: ... ready 先处理未收尾 run leftover items are no longer [ ]/[>].; TASKS/STATE.md status is done for the current run snapshot.; Command(s) pass: make verify; Evidence updated: reports/{RUN_ID}/summary.md and reports/{RUN_ID}/decision.md
restatement.stop_condition: finish and wait for next instruction; if blocked, record stop reason in decision.md

understanding.project_summary: quant-factory-os is the governance/execution base for quant engineering.
understanding.project_goal: quant-factory-os 是一个“自举式智能工厂操作系统”：它能**自动执行任务**、能**从证据链与错题本学习变强**、能**训练/引导新的智能体加入并理解因果链**、能**自我迭代升级工具与流程**、最终能**多智能协作形成涌现智能**，并把这些能力用于任何项目（最初是量化策略工厂，最终是通用项目底座）。
understanding.constitution_interpretation: 约束是任务驱动、证据优先、scope 严格、文档新鲜度硬门禁。
understanding.workflow_interpretation: 流程以门禁推进：sync 同频 -> ready 上岗 -> orient/choose 定方向 -> council/arbiter 收敛 -> slice 拆解 -> do 执行 -> verify/review/ship 收尾。
